title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Mahindra Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Mahindra Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Mahindra Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Mysuru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Mahindra Logistics:
Mahindra Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
